seo.metaTitle: Managed VPS Hosting India — Fully Managed VPS, Zero Hassle | ICSDC
seo.metaDescription: ICSDC Managed VPS Hosting gives you dedicated server resources with a full management team behind it. OS updates, security, monitoring, and 24/7 support from ₹999/month.

api::managed-vps-hosting-page.managed-vp.heroTitle: Fully Managed VPS — Powerful Infrastructure, Zero Hassle
api::managed-vps-hosting-page.managed-vp.heroDescription: Get the performance of a dedicated VPS with a full team of experts managing every aspect of it. ICSDC Managed VPS handles OS updates, security patches, performance tuning, monitoring, and backups — so you focus entirely on your business.

pillars.title: Fully Managed
pillars.desc: Every aspect of your VPS is handled by ICSDC experts — from initial setup to ongoing maintenance.

pillars.title: Dedicated Resources
pillars.desc: Guaranteed vCPU, RAM, and NVMe SSD — your resources are never shared with other users.

pillars.title: Proactive Security
pillars.desc: Security patches, firewall management, malware scanning, and intrusion detection — always on.

pillars.title: 24/7 Expert Support
pillars.desc: Direct access to senior Linux engineers via phone, chat, or ticket — around the clock.

api::managed-vps-hosting-page.managed-vp.plansTitle: Managed VPS Plans — Your Server, Our Responsibility
api::managed-vps-hosting-page.managed-vp.plansSubtitle: All plans include full management, NVMe SSD, dedicated IP, daily backups, and 24/7 support.

plans.tagline: Managed VPS for small websites and growing apps

api::managed-vps-hosting-page.managed-vp.featuresTitle: Everything You Need, All Handled for You
api::managed-vps-hosting-page.managed-vp.featuresSubtitle: ICSDC Managed VPS includes the full operational stack — so you get VPS power without VPS complexity.

features.title: OS & Software Updates
features.desc: Kernel, OS, and software packages kept up to date automatically — zero manual work required.

features.title: 24/7 Uptime Monitoring
features.desc: Real-time monitoring with instant incident alerts and auto-recovery for maximum availability.

features.title: Security Management
features.desc: Firewall rules, fail2ban, intrusion detection, and regular security audits — always in place.

features.title: Automated Backups
features.desc: Daily to real-time backups with point-in-time restore — your data is always recoverable.

features.title: Control Panel Setup
features.desc: cPanel, Plesk, DirectAdmin, or Webmin installed and configured by our team at no extra charge.

features.title: Performance Optimisation
features.desc: Web server, PHP, and database settings tuned for your specific workload by our Linux experts.

api::managed-vps-hosting-page.managed-vp.whatWeManageSubtitle: From the OS to the application layer, our team manages everything so you never need to.

whatWeManage.title: Operating System
whatWeManage.desc: Full OS management — updates, patches, kernel hardening, and security configurations.

whatWeManage.desc: iptables/nftables rules, fail2ban, intrusion detection, and regular security scans.

whatWeManage.desc: CPU, RAM, disk, and network metrics tracked 24/7 with proactive alerting.

whatWeManage.desc: Automated backups with offsite storage and tested restore procedures.

whatWeManage.title: Database Management

api::managed-vps-hosting-page.managed-vp.whyManagedSubtitle: Self-managed VPS requires constant attention. A misconfiguration or missed patch can cost you far more than the management fee.

whyManagedCards.title: Reclaim Developer Time
whyManagedCards.desc: Stop spending engineering hours on server maintenance. Your team focuses on building, not administering.

whyManagedCards.title: Always Secure
whyManagedCards.desc: Every security patch applied within hours of release — no vulnerability windows left open.

whyManagedCards.title: Guaranteed Uptime
whyManagedCards.desc: Our team responds to incidents in minutes, not hours — 99.9% uptime SLA on every plan.

whyManagedCards.title: Expert Team on Call
whyManagedCards.desc: Senior Linux engineers available 24/7 — more expertise than most in-house teams can provide.

api::managed-vps-hosting-page.managed-vp.testimonialTitle: What Our Managed VPS Clients Say
api::managed-vps-hosting-page.managed-vp.faqTitle: FAQs About ICSDC Managed VPS Hosting
api::managed-vps-hosting-page.managed-vp.faqContactDesc:
Our managed VPS team is available 24/7 for consultations, migrations, and support.

📞 +91 98109 58857

faq.question: What is the difference between managed and unmanaged VPS?
faq.answer: An unmanaged VPS gives you a bare server — you handle everything from OS configuration to security and updates. A managed VPS from ICSDC includes a team of experts who handle all of that for you, so you just use the server without worrying about it.

faq.question: Do I still get root access with a managed VPS?
faq.answer: Yes. You retain full root SSH access to your VPS at all times. Our management layer runs alongside your access — you can make changes, and our team will continue managing the server-level operations.

faq.question: Which control panels do you support?
faq.answer: We support cPanel/WHM, Plesk, DirectAdmin, and Webmin. Our team installs and configures your preferred control panel at no extra cost.

faq.question: Can you migrate my existing server to ICSDC Managed VPS?
faq.answer: Yes. Free migration is included with all managed VPS plans. Our team handles file transfer, database migration, DNS cutover, and testing — with zero downtime.

faq.question: How quickly do you respond to server issues?
faq.answer: Our monitoring detects issues within seconds. For critical incidents, an engineer is responding within 15 minutes around the clock — 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

ctaBand2.title: Start Your Managed VPS Journey Today

testimonials.name: Rahul Gupta

testimonials.name: Kavitha Reddy
testimonials.quote: We host 12 client websites on ICSDC Managed VPS. The security updates, backups, and uptime monitoring give us and our clients complete confidence.

testimonials.name: Vikram Joshi
testimonials.quote: The migration was done overnight with zero downtime. Performance improved immediately and the 24/7 support has been invaluable during our product launches.
